title: TechReborn Jetpacks
description: This project adds jetpacks to TechReborn as an addon. Jetpacks are allowing you to fly around and hover, using energy. Simple as nothing.
body:
The TechReborn Jetpacks mod adds Jetpacks that doesn't exist in TechReborn for some reason. With this mod you can craft four tiers of jetpacks that will make you able to fly around and slowly hover down to the ground. Mod is really simple and seems to be balanced enough to make the road to quantum armor less tough.

See galery for crafts and additional info. Anyways, mod is JEI compatible.

![Jetpack  showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c0c4b8f4d7db9b675b51513553a851675363419.png)

![Crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1P0vK6mJ/images/fad289e176a4d3206651b2e322d526f39fc41f82.png)
